title: Executive Order 5798—Power-Site Restoration No. 467, Oregon
text:
So much of Executive order of December 12, 1917, creating Power-Site Reserve No. 660, as affects the lands hereinafter described, is hereby revoked:
Willamette Meridian
T. 2 S., R. 5 E., sec. 7, lot 5;
sec. 15, N. ½ NW. ¼, SW. ¼ NW. ¼.
HERBERT HOOVER
The White House,
February 11, 1932.
